puzzle.title: The Caller from the Deep
puzzle.intro: Imagine a soul entrusted with a divine message, yet one who, in a moment of haste, departed from their people without explicit permission. This journey led them into an extraordinary trial, a profound test of patience and reliance upon the Most High. Who is this individual whose story teaches us about repentance and the vastness of Allah's mercy?
clues: I was sent to a great nation, but their initial rejection caused me distress.
I left my people, believing my mission was complete, before receiving a clear command to depart.
I sought passage on a ship, but a heavy storm and a drawing of lots led to a dire situation.
I was cast into the sea, and a mighty creature of the deep swallowed me whole.
Within the darkness of its belly, I called out to Allah, admitting my wrongdoing and seeking His forgiveness.
Allah commanded the creature to cast me onto the shore, and I was restored to health under a unique plant.

trial.label: Trial/Event
options: Being swallowed by a great fish
The destruction of a city by stones
trial.answer: Being swallowed by a great fish

outcome.label: Outcome
options: Returned to guide a repentant nation
outcome.answer: Returned to guide a repentant nation

puzzle.verse: Then the fish swallowed him, while he was blameworthy. (37:142)
